inputs.name: accessibilityAttributes
inputs.description:
Defines additional accessibility attributes on different areas of the component.

The accessibilityAttributes object has the following fields:

- **mainContent**: `mainContent.ariaLabel` defines the aria-label of the main content area. Accepts any string.
- **sideContent**: `sideContent.ariaLabel` defines the aria-label of the side content area. Accepts any string.

inputs.name: equalSplit
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is in equal split mode. In this mode, the side and
the main content take 50:50 percent of the container on all screen sizes
except for phone, where the main and side contents are switching visibility
using the toggle method.

inputs.name: hideMainContent
inputs.description: Defines the visibility of the main content.

inputs.name: hideSideContent
inputs.description: Defines the visibility of the side content.

inputs.name: sideContentFallDown
inputs.description: Defines on which breakpoints the side content falls down below the main content.

inputs.name: sideContentPosition
inputs.description:
Defines whether the side content is positioned before the main content (left side
in LTR mode), or after the the main content (right side in LTR mode).

inputs.name: sideContentVisibility
inputs.description: Defines on which breakpoints the side content is visible.

outputs.name: ui5LayoutChange
outputs.description: Fires when the current breakpoint has been changed.
